action: Created StageIndicator class with stage_done/stage_active/finish methods. Added Spinner.stop() for silent lifecycle. 12 tests pass.
notes: 3 CQR rounds: (1) icon character fix, (2) Rich markup escape + spinner leak guard, (3) spinner lifecycle ownership with Spinner.stop()

action: Implemented SessionManager, SoulManager, UserMemoryManager with 47 tests. CQR found 10 issues across 6 rounds: path traversal, index locking, atomic writes, stale entries, format normalization, UUID validation, structure validation, concurrency locks.
notes: 6 CQR rounds total. Session.py grew from ~100 to ~400 lines due to defensive validation. All 237 tests pass, 0 failures.

action: Refactored MemoryStorage from path-based to session-based. CQR found 4 issues: CLI crash (deferred to T4), silent data loss on resume, corrupt file crash, quarantine path traversal. All fixed with TDD.
notes: 5 CQR rounds. CLI crash deferred to Task 4. Quarantine defense-in-depth added.

action: Refactored MemoryStrategy constructor, added build_system_prompt with onboarding/memory management templates. CQR flagged template injection — added data-guard preambles. CLI crash deferred to Task 4.
notes: 2 CQR rounds. Data-guard preambles added for prompt injection prevention. CLI crash deferred to Task 4.

action: Implemented MemoryProvider Protocol, BrixMemoryProvider, concurrent resume merge with session-level locking, monotonic index updates, index rebuild persistence
notes: 9 CQR rounds (7 Codex, 2 Claude subagent). Fixes: session-level locking, concurrent merge, base_count tracking from merged result, clear sentinel, datetime monotonic index, index rebuild persistence, UUID validation in _with_session_lock.

action: Added memory/data/ to .gitignore, added data_dir to config/settings.yaml, ran full test suite (270 passed, 14 pre-existing failures)
notes: All 14 failures are pre-existing (capability Python 3.8, CLI constructor change, langgraph missing). No new regressions.
